summary: Founder of Widget Co; met at the spring demo day.

Alice Example is the founder of Widget Co. She raised concerns about pricing during the 2026-Q1 diligence call.

title: Widget Co
type: company
summary: Seed-stage widget marketplace founded by Alice Example.

Widget Co is a seed-stage widget marketplace. Alice Example is the founder. The seed round discussion started in 2026-Q1.

---
title: Charlie Example
type: person
summary: Angel investor introduced by Alice.
---

Charlie Example is an angel investor who co-invests with fund-a.

turns.text: What did Alice Example say about the Widget Co deal?
She raised pricing concerns during the Q1 diligence call.
Can you draft an intro email to Charlie Example about it?
